data.title: Metropolitan Veterinary Associates partners with Harcum College to enhance veterinary career pathways through mentorship and training.
data.description: Metropolitan Veterinary Associates (MVA), a top specialty and emergency veterinary hospital in NORRISTOWN, Pa., has recently formed a partnership with Harcum College’s Animal Center Management program. This new collaboration aims to support and groom the upcoming veterinary workforce by offering students practical learning experiences, mentorship, and pathways for career growth. Through this partnership, MVA will actively engage with Harcum College in providing valuable knowledge and support to the students.

data.title: True's Benjamin Bilski from Solana-based AI platform discusses potential impact of US access to perpetual futures on expanding crypto derivatives market, highlighting importance of regulatory clarity. Interview with Benzinga emphasizes innovation in decentralized finance. Launching $TRUE token sale for AI-native perpetuals DEX on Solana.
data.description: Benjamin Bilski, representative of the Solana-based AI trading platform True, expressed the significance of making perpetual futures available in the U.S., stating that it would validate their model and lead to an expansion of the market. Bilski emphasized the potential impact of regulatory clarity on decentralized derivatives and AI-driven trading. While they do not actively target the U.S. market, they welcome regulatory clarity globally. Bilski highlighted that regardless of regulations, innovation in decentralized finance will persist as users continue to value transparency, instant access, and self-custody. True is launching its $TRUE token sale to support the first AI-native perpetuals DEX on Solana, aiming to provide high-speed off-chain execution.

data.title: Gold surpasses $3,600 mark, hitting record highs amidst tokenization trend. Is bullion the ultimate 'digital gold'?
data.description: The price of gold has surged to new all-time highs, exceeding $3,600, propelled by the growing trend of tokenization that has made the precious metal accessible on blockchain technology. This development has sparked a debate over whether gold is evolving into the ultimate digital store of value, akin to Bitcoin.

data.title: Dow falls post-weak jobs report; Nvidia stock drops, Tesla rises; Bessent urges Fed review. Schwab also tumbles.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following a disappointing August jobs report. During this time, Nvidia's stock plummeted, whereas Tesla's stock saw an increase in value. The market update highlighted the Dow's downward trend, mentioning specific companies such as Nvidia and Schwab facing drops in their stocks. The live coverage noted calls from Bessent for a review of the Federal Reserve amidst the market fluctuations.

data.title: Filecoin (FIL) price at $2.32 holds above $2.30, indicating neutral momentum with 2.16% daily gain and RSI at 46.85.
data.description: The price of FIL is currently $2.32, showing a slight daily increase of 2.16%. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 46.85, indicating neutral momentum for the decentralized storage token. The technical signals for FIL are mixed at the moment.

data.title: indie Semiconductor grants equity awards to new employees under its 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. Visit website for details.
data.description: A company based in Aliso Viejo, California, indie Semiconductor (Nasdaq: INDI), known for its automotive solutions, disclosed the awarding of equity grants to new employees under its 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. These grants, termed as the “Inducement Grants,” were sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of indie Semiconductor's Board of Directors. Further details about the equity awards can be accessed through the company's investor relations website.

data.title: Nvidia's stock has dropped over 9% since Aug 12 despite strong quarterly results and growth. Analysts speculate on reasons.
data.description: The article discusses the recent performance of semiconductor giant Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA) in the stock market. Despite a strong start to the year with a 24% gain, NVDA stock has dropped over 9% since August 12. The company posted strong quarterly results and provided solid guidance for the upcoming quarter, with revenue estimates exceeding expectations. However, concerns over sales in China and competition from Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) have dampened investor enthusiasm. AVGO's positive earnings and optimistic future outlook, including plans to challenge Nvidia in the AI chip market, have led to a surge in AVGO stock and contributed to downward pressure on NVDA stock. Investor sentiment remains cautious, but some see potential upside for Nvidia stock amidst the current volatility.

data.title: Wing It On! dominates National Buffalo Wing Fest with wins in every flavor category, eyeing expansion in Northeast.
data.description: A well-known franchise has achieved a significant milestone by securing multiple No. 1 titles at the country's biggest wing festival. This award-winning concept, Wing It On!, is now targeting the Northeast region for expansion with its championship-level food and solid operational systems. The achievement sets this franchise apart as one of the very few to receive multiple top honors at the prestigious festival. The success story of Wing It On! speaks volumes about its potential for growth and excellence in the competitive world of wing restaurants. With these achievements under its belt, the franchise is now eyeing expansion into the Northeast region, where it aims to replicate its success by offering top-quality wings and efficient operational practices.

data.title: Crown Castle CFO to present at 2025 RBC Comm Infrastructure Conference on Sep 17 at 9:30 am ET for 20 mins. Webcast available on their website.
data.description: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) revealed that Sunit Patel, the company's Executive Vice President and CFO, will speak on September 17, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time during the 2025 RBC Capital Markets Global Communications Infrastructure Conference. The presentation, estimated to run for about 20 minutes, will be streamed live online. Those interested can access the live audio webcast and presentation on Crown Castle’s website at www.crowncastle.com, with the content available for later replay.

data.title: Federal judge dismisses Newsmax's lawsuit against Fox News over alleged right-leaning TV news monopoly but allows chance to refile.
data.description: A federal judge has allowed Newsmax to potentially refile its claim that Fox News established a monopoly in conservative television news. The judge's decision leaves room for Newsmax to pursue its complaint against Fox in the future. This ruling could have significant implications for the media industry as it pertains to right-leaning television news outlets. Details regarding this legal development were not disclosed.

data.title: Kilroy Realty Corp (NYSE: KRC) will join Bank of America 2025 Global Real Estate Conference on Sept 9, 2025, for a 35-min roundtable at 1:30 pm ET.
data.description: Los Angeles-based Kilroy Realty Corporation (NYSE: KRC) revealed that its senior management team will take part in a roundtable talk at the Bank of America 2025 Global Real Estate Conference on Tuesday, September 9, 2025. The live panel discussion starts at about 1:30 p.m. Eastern Time and will last roughly 35 minutes. The Company's involvement in the conference will be streamed online.

data.title: Error in Air Canada flight attendant ratification vote announcement published prematurely, final result expected after 3PM ET Saturday.
data.description: In Ottawa, a statement about the Air Canada flight attendant ratification vote was mistakenly released today. The statement, part of various drafts for different scenarios, was premature as the voting is ongoing and will conclude on Saturday, September 6. The final result is scheduled to be announced after 3PM ET on the same day, with the official outcome yet to be determined.
